steps: Click 'Sign Up' to create a new account with your email address
Confirm your email address via the verification link
Log in to the dashboard at https://dashboard.lecto.ai/
Your API key is displayed on the main dashboard page
Copy the API key and use it in the X-API-Key request header

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Lecto AI API key displayed on the dashboard after signing up

notes: Free trial available — no credit card required
Pricing is based on characters translated per month
JSON translation preserves document structure while translating string values

test_endpoint.description: Returns the list of all supported translation languages
